page_metadata.biotools__summary: It is for the inference of non-chimeric contigs from read data that has been sequenced from complex multi-isoformic transcriptomes, such as snake venom glands, or rapidly evolving viral populations, such as HIV-1.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: It is for the inference of non-chimeric contigs from read data that has been sequenced from complex multi-isoformic transcriptomes, such as snake venom glands, or rapidly evolving viral populations, such as HIV-1.
